devnet_5_design.highlight: Devnet 5: Fold 8 attestation proofs + block sig into single on-chain proof
Multi-message proof disaggregation confirmed possible; removes binary tree complexity
PQ heartbeat (Goldfish availability protocol) proposed for devnet 5

client_updates.highlight: Leem optimizing aggregator flows for minimal thread locking
Prysm: Devnet 3 retired, devnet 5 scaffolding ready
Kuleen: Debug mode fork of Lean Multisig for low-resource testing
Grandine: Switching CPU tasks from Tokio to dedicated executor

specification_updates.highlight: Multi-fork architecture PR ready for review
LeanVM: 25% performance improvement from new memory allocator

testing_infrastructure.highlight: Client interop tests show Leem incompatible with Lintern/Kuleen
Grafana Loki logs available at metrics.leanroadmap.org

action_items.action: Submit bug reports with logs to LeanSpec for spec-level issues

Implement Type 1/Type 2 proof disaggregation in Lean Multisig

decisions.decision: Devnet 5: Add PQ heartbeat (Goldfish) + meta-aggregated proofs
Binary tree propagation design replaced by proof disaggregation approach
